highlights.title: PyPI-Ready Project Metadata
highlights.description: Round out the package metadata with project URLs, classifiers, keywords, author information, and an explicit MIT license so the distribution is ready for a proper PyPI release.

highlights.title: Installable CLI and Web Assets
highlights.description: Expose the `tg-search` console entry point and include the bundled web templates and static assets in package data so installed builds behave like the source checkout.

highlights.title: Release Publishing Workflow
highlights.description: Add the repository release script, token placeholders in `.env.example`, and the missing license file so the staged TestPyPI-to-PyPI publication flow is reproducible.
